headline: Rosenblatt Sets a $1,000 Seagate Price Target: Is This the Most Bullish HDD Call of 2026?
summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) has received Wall Street’s boldest hard disk drive (HDD) call of 2026.
